ksa_text: Skill in developing emerging technology assessment processes for evaluating new tools, platforms, and methodologies, including vendor evaluation, proof-of-concept design, and integration feasibility analysis.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This skill KSA describes execution-level work in Leadership & Strategy that is not expected of a AI Innovation Lead (senior specialist tier). The role is responsible for overseeing and directing this work, not performing it directly. Excluded on execution-seniority grounds.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this execution-level skill KSA be expected of a AI Innovation Lead in real-world practice?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Compensation benchmarks and leadership effectiveness research confirm that senior specialist-tier roles direct and oversee execution work in Leadership & Strategy rather than performing it. Role scope analysis supports exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: execution-level skill KSA in Leadership & Strategy is appropriately excluded for a non-execution senior specialist role. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Execution-level skill KSA in Leadership & Strategy is outside the expected competency scope for a AI Innovation Lead (senior specialist tier). The role oversees this work; it does not perform it directly.
